title: chrysothemis pulchella
intro: Chrysothemis pulchella, also known as the Hawaiian hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Chrysothemis pulchella include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and swelling, and treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Chrysothemis pulchella include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
